meta.title: Oviva Care – Women's Hormonal Health Webinar
meta.description: Save your spot at the women's hormonal health webinar. Boost your mood and get back your energy.

hero.question: You feel tired, hungry, foggy, anxious, and you crave for sugar all the time?
hero.headline: Boost Your Mood & Get Back Your Energy

items.text: no matter how much you sleep?

dive.title: What we'll dive into:
dive.item1Desc: Explore the causes of fatigue, brain-fog, anxiety, sleep issues, and sugar cravings.
dive.item2Desc: Gain simple, everyday strategies to combat brain fog, improve focus, and manage symptoms.
dive.item3Desc: Identify what's contributing to your anxiety and sleep problems and get actionable solutions.
dive.item4Desc: Learn how hormonal changes affect these symptoms and what's really going on in your body.
dive.item5Desc: Discover ways to balance your hormones and curb your sugar cravings.
dive.item6Desc: Connect with other women facing similar challenges and share experiences.

speaker.title: Meet our speaker
speaker.name: Agnieszka Fronia
speaker.bio1: Hi, I am Agnieszka and I am certified women's health expert with passion for helping others.
speaker.bio2: For many years, I struggled with hormonal health issues such as acne, hair loss, weight gain, absence of periods, insomnia, and high levels of stress and anxiety. I decided to take control of my health.
speaker.bio3: Since 2015, I've travelled across South America and India, exploring various methods to resolve my symptoms. I became a certified yoga, meditation, and breath-work teacher.
speaker.bio4: I earned an MSc in Psychological Medicine and Mental Health from London Metropolitan University, related to hormones, inflammation and gut health.
speaker.bio5: My goal is to help you navigate your hormonal, physical, psychological, and emotional health with ease.
speaker.bio6: Join my upcoming webinar so we can get to know each other better and gain the knowledge you need to take control of your health.

oviva.title: What is Oviva Care
oviva.mission: Our mission is to create a future where every woman has the Knowledge, Resources and Support.

testimonials.title: What people are saying
testimonials.lauraQuote: Very resonating session with a good balance for theory and practice. Very practical and easy to integrate. I think the hormonal world is a very unknown and influential world, so I believe more webinars like this are needed more often.
testimonials.manuelaQuote: In Agnieszka I found a professional and at the same time human curiosity - devoid of any form of judgment. NO ANY PRE-SET PLAN. Agnieszka supported me through a customized program based on my symptoms. I learnt to take care of my thoughts, my spaces, my daily routine and all of this is having such a profound impact on my whole life!
testimonials.patrycjaQuote: I was diagnosed with PCOS a few years ago. It was Agnieszka who drew my attention to test myself in this direction when I told her how I felt and what my symptoms were. Thanks to her, I am definitely more aware of the direction in which I should be going. I am only at the beginning of this road, because I have recently decided to stop taking birth control. I believe that with her help I will achieve my health goal.

cta.headline: Boost Your Mood & Get Back Your Energy

aboutMeta.title: About Me & Work With Me – Agnieszka Fronia
aboutMeta.description: Women's Health Psychologist. Supporting women who feel overwhelmed, anxious, exhausted, or disconnected from themselves.

aboutHero.headline: You deserve to feel whole again
aboutHero.subtitle: Supporting women who feel overwhelmed, anxious, exhausted, or disconnected from themselves.
aboutHero.description: This is a calm and safe space where your symptoms are taken seriously.
aboutHero.approach: Heal your anxiety, panic attacks, and hormone-related symptoms through a science-based and compassionate approach that respects your nervous system and your lived experience.

aboutSymptoms.title: You're not imagining your symptoms
aboutSymptoms.intro: If you're here, you may have been told that your tests are "normal", yet you still experience:
items: Mood swings, irritability, or emotional overwhelm
Fatigue, brain fog, or sleep problems
Symptoms that worsen around your cycle
Symptoms connected to your perimenopause transition
A sense that your body is working against you

aboutApproach.title: A different way of working with anxiety and mental health
aboutApproach.description: Many women are offered psychological therapy without hormonal support. However, the nervous system, hormonal balance, and emotional health are deeply interconnected.
aboutApproach.statement: These symptoms are real and they deserve a deeper, more integrated understanding.
aboutApproach.resultsTitle: Women who work with me often begin to experience:
results: Clearer understanding of their hormonal patterns
Feeling calmer and more in control of their body
Greater confidence in managing stress and anxiety
Feeling understood and supported rather than dismissed

aboutPillars.title: What it feels like to work with me

pillars.title: Psychological Therapy
pillars.description: As a psychologist, I provide evidence-based tools for anxiety, panic attacks, emotional regulation, and stress. We work at a pace that respects your nervous system, helping it move out of chronic survival mode.

pillars.title: Hormonal & Functional Health Insight
pillars.description: I assess whether hormonal imbalances may be contributing to your symptoms, with particular attention to thyroid, adrenal, and sex hormones and their relationship to anxiety, mood, energy levels, and sleep.

pillars.title: Lab Test Interpretation
pillars.description: If you have existing lab results, I help you understand what they mean in the context of your symptoms, life circumstances, and hormonal stage so the information becomes useful rather than overwhelming.

pillars.title: Personalised Protocols
pillars.description: Based on your individual presentation, I develop clear, realistic protocols that may include lifestyle adjustments, nutrition guidance, nervous system practices, and supportive strategies.

aboutPillars.note: This is not a one-size-fits-all approach. All support is personalised.

aboutBio.title: About Me
aboutBio.intro: Hi, I'm Agnieszka Fronia, a psychologist specialised in women's hormonal health and nervous system regulation.
aboutBio.p1: I help women who feel overwhelmed, anxious, exhausted, or disconnected from their bodies to regain confidence, emotional stability, and a sense of control. My work combines psychological therapy, hormonal health insight, and nervous system regulation so you can understand the root causes of your symptoms — not just manage them.
aboutBio.p2: With a master's degree in psychological medicine and mental health, I integrate knowledge from psychology, neuroendocrinology, and lifestyle medicine to provide a clear, science-based approach that is also compassionate and practical.
aboutBio.p3: I create safe, supportive spaces where women can have honest conversations about topics often considered taboo, including anxiety, panic attacks, menopause, perimenopause, menstrual pain, miscarriage, IVF, and other hormonal or emotional challenges.
aboutBio.p4: Together, we explore what your body and mind are trying to tell you and develop personalised strategies that help you feel calmer, clearer, and more in control.
credentials: Master's degree in Psychological Medicine & Mental Health
Experience supporting women with anxiety and hormonal transitions

aboutServices.title: Services & Pricing
aboutServices.therapySubtitle: For women who want in-depth, personalised support for anxiety, panic attacks, and hormonal-related symptoms.
aboutServices.therapyDescription: This is ongoing 1:1 work that integrates psychological therapy with hormonal and nervous system support.
therapyItems: Psychological therapy with a women's health psychologist
Continuous guidance and adjustment as your body responds
aboutServices.therapyNote: Sessions are structured, calm, and paced according to your nervous system.
aboutServices.singleNote: Suitable for existing clients or short-term support.
monthlyIncludes: Email or message support between sessions
quarterlyIncludes: Email or message support between sessions
aboutServices.quarterlyNote: This option allows for deeper, more sustainable change and is recommended for anxiety, panic attacks, and hormonal transitions such as perimenopause.
aboutServices.labSubtitle: For women who want professional interpretation of their lab results and clear next steps.
aboutServices.labDescription: This session is often the best starting point for women who feel confused about their symptoms, test results, or hormonal changes.
labIncludes: Review of existing lab tests (thyroid, adrenal, sex hormones, etc.)
Explanation of results in plain, understandable language
Connection between hormonal patterns and mental/emotional symptoms
Clear, realistic recommendations for next steps
aboutServices.notSure: Not sure which option is right for you?
aboutServices.notSureDescription: A clarity call allows us to talk through your symptoms and explore the most appropriate type of support.
